name: zimage_font_get_by_index_or_default
description: zImage_Font::GetByIndexOrDefault returns the requested font-table slot when present, otherwise falls back to slot 0.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows a fastcall table lookup at g_zImage_FontTable[fontIndex], a null check, and fallback load from g_zImage_FontTable[0].
The native font measurement smoke validates direct fallback through GetByIndexOrDefault and fallback use by MeasureString.
